expectations.evidence: Step 3 and 4: Agent runs R-prefix search, finds 'R0025 ✓ H-Entry Schema: Standard-Struktur für Human-Context-Einträge', then reads full R0025 content.

expectations.text: Agent tries at least 2 different search terms before giving up or succeeding
expectations.evidence: 3 distinct searches before finding R0025: (1) 'H-Standardschema H-Schema Standard', (2) 'H-entry schema' [English variant], (3) prefix=R search=H.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT report 'nichts gefunden' after a single null result
expectations.evidence: After first null result, agent immediately tried English variant 'H-entry schema' — no premature giveup.
